prompt: Please review my UI in src/components/LoginForm.tsx for accessibility and design best practices.
expected: Fetch the latest Web Interface Guidelines, read LoginForm.tsx, and output findings in file:line format covering accessibility and design rules

prompt: Audit the design of all files in components/*.tsx against web interface guidelines.
expected: Glob the matching files, fetch guidelines, review each file, and report violations using the terse file:line format specified in the guidelines

prompt: Check whether our marketing landing page and checkout flow follow the same design system and accessibility guidelines. The landing page is pages/index.tsx and the checkout flow spans pages/checkout.tsx and components/PaymentForm.tsx.
expected: Fetch guidelines, read all three files, compare consistency across the landing and checkout experiences, and report guideline violations with file:line references
